# Hull Plumbing Services — LLM Context File

> Hull Plumbing Services provides emergency plumbing, boiler repairs, drainage, leak detection, and general plumbing across Hull and surrounding areas. Vetted engineers. 12-month guarantee. Part of Go Assist Ltd.

## About Us
- **Parent company:** Go Assist Ltd
- **Founded:** 2007
- **Experience:** 17 years serving UK homeowners
- **Engineers:** All employed or thoroughly vetted subcontractors, DBS checked
- **Guarantee:** 12-month workmanship guarantee on all repairs
- **Pricing:** Transparent, upfront pricing before any work begins
- **Trustpilot:** 4.1-star rating (22,701 reviews on go-assist.co.uk)

## Services
- Emergency Plumber Hull
- Blocked Drains Hull
- Tap & Toilet Repairs Hull
- General Plumbing Hull
- Boiler Repairs Hull
- Leak Detection Hull
- Radiators & Heating Hull

## Areas Covered
- Newland Avenue
- Cottingham
- Hessle
- Anlaby
- Spring Bank
- Beverley Road
- Bransholme
- City Centre

- East Hull
- Willerby
- Kirk Ella

## Contact
